---
name: bmad-brainstorming
description: 'Facilitate interactive brainstorming sessions using diverse creative techniques and ideation methods. Use when the user says help me brainstorm or help me ideate.'
artifacts:
  - path: brain-methods.csv
    source: brain-methods.csv
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: template.md
    source: template.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: workflow.md
    source: workflow.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-01-session-setup.md
    source: steps/step-01-session-setup.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-01b-continue.md
    source: steps/step-01b-continue.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-02a-user-selected.md
    source: steps/step-02a-user-selected.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-02b-ai-recommended.md
    source: steps/step-02b-ai-recommended.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-02c-random-selection.md
    source: steps/step-02c-random-selection.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-02d-progressive-flow.md
    source: steps/step-02d-progressive-flow.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-03-technique-execution.md
    source: steps/step-03-technique-execution.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
  - path: steps/step-04-idea-organization.md
    source: steps/step-04-idea-organization.md
    kind: scaffold-verbatim
---

Follow the instructions in ./workflow.md.
